channel.title: ThreatDigest Hub - Curated Cyber Incidents
channel.description: A curated list of recent cyber incidents, attacks, and security threats.

item.title: [DARK WEB] thegentlemen ransomware: new victim 'Sodimatel Fasteners' (FR)
[DARK WEB] thegentlemen ransomware: new victim 'Grupo San Jacinto' (PE)
[DARK WEB] ThreatFox: Cobalt Strike — 10 new IOCs detected
[DARK WEB] ThreatFox: Remcos — 10 new IOCs detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with remcos .

item.title: Woman who got €5k from An Post cyber attack ran up €2k hotel bill and didn't pay
item.description:
Woman who got €5k from An Post cyber attack ran up €2k hotel bill and didn't pay
Kim Porter (31) pleaded guilty to 10 offences involving money laundering, deception, enhancing a criminal organisation, possession of cocaine and making off from a hotel without paying
View Image Kim Porter (31) pleaded guilty at Dublin Circuit Criminal Court to 10 offences involving money laundering, deception, enhancing a criminal organisation, possession of cocaine and making off from a hotel without paying ...

item.title: Madison Square Garden Worker Drops Suit Over Oracle Data Breach
item.description: A former Madison Square Garden Entertainment Corp . employee dropped his proposed class action alleging the company negligently failed to protect the personal information of approximately 130,000 current and former workers that was exposed in a recent data breach. Lead plaintiff Angel Liranzo filed a notice of voluntary dismissal March 6 in the US District Court for the Southern District of New York, two days after he filed the lawsuit.
